UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEARS, ARTHUR K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMEY, MARC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 659 FILLMORE ST #7, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
